info.title: Crevio API
info.description:
API for the Crevio creator platform — a multi-tenant SaaS for digital product sales.
Uses snake_case keys following Stripe conventions. All resource IDs are string prefix IDs (e.g., "prod_abc123").

get.description: Returns information about the authenticated account
Returns a list of published products for the current account
Returns detailed information about a specific product

post.description:
Returns 402 with payment requirements, or grants access on valid x402 payment.
Pass a price_variant query param to select a specific variant, otherwise the first visible variant is used.

parameters.name: price_variant
parameters.description: Price variant prefix ID to use for payment

200.description: Access granted after valid x402 payment

402.description: Payment required — includes x402 payment requirements in response headers

get.description: Returns all price variants for the current account
Returns a specific price variant
Returns reviews for products in the current account
Returns a specific review

post.description: Creates a new checkout session for purchasing products

get.description: Returns a specific checkout session
Returns a specific cart
Returns a list of orders for the current account

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, line_items

get.description: Returns a specific order

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: customer, line_items

get.description: Returns a list of customers for the current account
Returns a specific customer
Returns a list of discounts for the current account
Returns a specific discount
Returns a list of checkout links for the current account

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: discount, price_variants

post.description: Creates a new shareable checkout link

get.description: Returns a specific checkout link

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma-separated relations to expand: discount, price_variants

get.description: Returns a list of experiences for the current account

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Filter by experience type (e.g., Community, Course, Download)

get.description: Returns a specific experience
Returns a list of published blog posts
Returns a specific published blog post
Returns a list of webhook endpoints for the current account

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint. The secret is only returned on creation.

get.description: Returns a list of all available event types that can be subscribed to
Returns a specific webhook endpoint

post.description: Sends a test event to the webhook endpoint

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: The event type to send as a test

get.description: Returns the x402 payment configuration for the current account

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key in the format: Bearer {api_token}

StartingAfter.name: starting_after
StartingAfter.description: Cursor for pagination — the prefix ID of the last item in the previous page

price_variants.description: Always included — visible, non-archived variants ordered by position

revoke_after_days.description: Days after which access is revoked

client_secret.description: Stripe client secret for completing payment

customer.description: Customer prefix ID by default. When expand=customer, returns a full Customer object.

discount.description: Discount prefix ID by default. When expand=discount, returns a full Discount object.

WebhookEndpointWithSecret.description: Returned only on creation — includes the signing secret

email.description: Customer email — creates or finds a customer

_destroy.description: Set to true to remove item

amount_off.description: Discount amount in cents (required if discount_type=amount_off)

price_variants.description: Limit discount to specific price variant prefix IDs

error.message: You did not provide an API key.
The requested resource was not found
